arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'targeting suprise move' for Serie A goalkeeper
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly considering a surprise move to sign Napoli goalkeeper Alex Meret, who is out of contract at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: 'He will join Arsenal' - Huge £49.8m transfer claim made for perfect Mikel Arteta signing - football.london
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has been told that PSV Eindhoven star Ismael Saibari could be the perfect signing for Arsenal. Unsurprisingly, following such a scintillating display, Dutch pundits have been full of praise for Saibari and teammate Malik Tillman, who has been linked to Tottenham, with the former believed to be perfect for Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca sends blunt Premier League title race message to Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal - unbeaten in three Premier League matches - are set to face Manchester United on Wednesday, while Chelsea will be heading to Southampton. Yet, Maresca, who once worked alongside Guardiola at City, is adamant that title discussions are premature for Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Gabriel decision made as £26m man drops out: Arsenal predicted XI v Manchester United
arts.sum: Arsenal will lock horns with Manchester United in Wednesday night’s Premier League clash at the Emirates Stadium. For years, Arsenal v Manchester United was the...

arts.ttl: Man United star 'hopeful the club will give him a fresh contract' under Ruben Amorim - despite having just months left to run on his current deal
arts.sum: The former Sporting Lisbon boss has so far used his favoured 3-4-3 formation and it is expected that he will look to the transfer market in an attempt to turn around United's fortunes.

arts.ttl: Man Utd target TEN players ahead of Amorim's first transfer window
arts.sum: Man Utd target TEN players ahead of Amorim's first transfer window However, Man Utd are expected to dip into the transfer market for reinforcements in 2025, despite reports suggesting that Amorim will be handed a smaller budget than the aforementioned Ten Hag.

arts.ttl: Manchester United sold me for £8.8m and then I became my nation's record goalscorer
Six Arsenal players could miss Manchester United clash after cryptic Mikel Arteta update
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news as Arsenal prepare for the visit of Ruben Amorim's men without a number of players

arts.ttl: Arsenal could set new club record against Man United in landmark Emirates game
arts.sum: Arsenal could set a new club first in Wednesday's Premier League clash with Manchester United, which will be their 500th competitive game at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: Liverpool sold me for £3.3m and now I’m keeping up with Bukayo Saka in assists
